headline: Did National Airlines’ 777-200F Deal and Trade Route Reopenings Just Reframe Boeing's (BA) Widebody Narrative?
summary: On April 14, 2026, National Airlines announced in Everett the delivery of its first Boeing 777-200F freighter, highlighting the aircraft’s long-range, fuel-efficient, high-payload capabilities and its role in the carrier’s ongoing fleet modernization, with three additional 777-200F deliveries planned in the coming months. Combined with Boeing’s recent hiring ramp-up and production plans, this new 777-200F deployment underscores how freight and passenger operators are leaning on Boeing’s...

headline: Viasat’s Boeing AERA Review Puts Growth Hopes Against Valuation Questions
summary: Viasat has entered Boeing’s technical evaluation process for its next generation AERA electronically steered antenna terminal. The assessment could lead to AERA being offered as a linefit connectivity option on all current Boeing commercial aircraft programs. The AERA terminal is designed for multi orbit satellite use, with potential implications for airline fleet planning and future upgrade paths. For investors watching Viasat, ticker NasdaqGS:VSAT, this development comes with the share...
